---
title: "Publications"
---

This page will hold a verified publication list, selected talks, and links to papers, preprints, datasets, or code when available.

::: {.note-box}
Do not add final citation details until titles, author order, journals, DOIs, and manuscript status are verified.
:::

## Published

::: {.publication-card}
**JGR: Earth Surface paper, 2025**  
Slow strike-slip faulting in a hyperarid landscape.  
*Full citation and DOI to add.*
:::

::: {.publication-card}
**GRL paper, 2025**  
Climate oscillation and fault slip rate controls on sediment aggradation and channel morphology.  
*Full citation and DOI to add.*
:::

::: {.publication-card}
**Oceanography paper, 2023**  
Bilingual coding, science communication, and technical training.  
*Full citation and link to add.*
:::

## Submitted and in revision

::: {.publication-card}
**Thermochronology manuscript**  
Cooling, exhumation, and basin development in the Coastal Cordillera.  
*Status and citation details to add.*
:::

## In preparation

::: {.publication-card}
**Sediment cover and ridge-valley migration modeling**  
*Project details to add.*
:::

::: {.publication-card}
**IRSL paleoseismic deposits**  
*Project details to add if this becomes a paper or appendix page.*
:::
